hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if echo "$f" | grep -qE '/(tokens|guidelines|components)/'; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"ADR REMINDER: The modified file is in a critical area of the design system (%s). Immediately ask the user: Would you like to create an ADR to document this change? (Yes/No)"}}' "$f"; fi

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if echo "$f" | grep -qE '(/components/agtc-[^/]*\.js$|/guidelines/components/[^/]*\.md$)' && ! echo "$f" | grep -q '\.stories\.'; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"UX PATTERNS REMINDER: component created or modified (%s). IF the change affects UX behavior (variant, state, validation, error/help display, interaction, new type): run the ux-pattern-review skill, present the reference patterns WITH LINKS for approval, then document the decision across the 6 surfaces (guideline, code, story, site, ADR, log). Otherwise, ignore this reminder."}}' "$f"; fi
